reasoning: The FedRAMP SC-7 (10) control focuses on preventing data exfiltration, which can be effectively managed in Kubernetes through NetworkPolicies that restrict egress traffic. By default, denying egress and allowing only necessary and trusted destinations can prevent unauthorized data exfiltration. Additionally, restricting the use of LoadBalancer services can prevent exposing services directly to the internet, which aligns with preventing exfiltration.
title: Boundary Protection | Prevent Exfiltration
